summary: 过去 24 小时 AI 新闻按技术、模型、商业、投资、安全与监管聚合。页面优先展示影响力高、来源清晰、并且能解释后续产业意义的信号。

keylines.title: 商业是今日主轴
keylines.text: 过去 24 小时里，商业相关内容占比最高，说明媒体报道和社交讨论正在向这一方向集中。

keylines.title: Grok / xAI带动 X 讨论
keylines.text: X 热点更偏实时体验和争议观点，适合用来捕捉模型、产品和安全事件的早期信号。

keylines.title: 基础设施仍是深层变量
keylines.text: 芯片、数据中心、电力和推理成本会持续决定 AI 产品能否从发布会走向规模化商业。

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
stories.summary: Apple has sued OpenAI, alleging that engineers stole Apple secrets to advance the AI startup's hardware plans.
stories.analysis: 用自家 Agent 完成融资是强营销信号，但真正的验证在于企业客户是否愿意把高价值流程交给同类自动化系统。

stories.title: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
stories.summary: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post.
stories.analysis: 这条新闻属于商业化信号，后续重点是它是否进入高频工作流，并形成稳定付费或留存。

stories.title: Meta turns off the Instagram feature that let users make AI deepfakes of public accounts
stories.summary: Following significant backlash, Meta is turning off the feature it announced this week that let users generate AI images based on content from public Instagram accounts just by tagging them.
stories.analysis: 安全与真实性议题正在从原则讨论进入可执行工具，媒体、平台和企业需要更快识别合成内容与自动化攻击。

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
stories.summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.
stories.analysis: 高管变动会影响 OpenAI 在 AGI、消费产品和商业化之间的资源分配，短期要看继任安排和关键团队稳定性。

stories.title: The Download: Claude’s inner workings and OpenAI’s “super app”
stories.summary: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology.
stories.analysis: 可解释性研究正在尝试把模型内部表征变成可观察对象，这会影响安全评估、调试方法和企业对黑箱风险的接受度。

stories.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
stories.summary: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.
stories.analysis: 芯片、模型套件和 Agent 编排框架一起出现时，重点不是单点性能，而是端到端推理成本、部署效率和生态绑定。

stories.title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
stories.summary: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by r...
stories.analysis: 版权诉讼的焦点正在从训练原则转向证据、数据集和输出归因，这会直接影响模型公司的合规成本与数据策略。

stories.title: Would you host part of an AI data center in your home?
stories.summary: A solar and home energy storage company is expanding into AI data centers, but not by building one - instead, it's offering to pay its customers to put its compute units in their homes.
stories.analysis: 资本与基础设施信号要和现金流、电力、算力利用率一起看，热度本身不等于可持续商业回报。

stories.title: Hugging Face’s CEO on why companies are done renting their AI
stories.summary: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by r...
stories.analysis: 版权诉讼的焦点正在从训练原则转向证据、数据集和输出归因，这会直接影响模型公司的合规成本与数据策略。

stories.title: Instagram’s Adam Mosseri: If you don’t like AI, ‘then you shouldn’t have it in your feed’
stories.summary: Though Instagram head Adam Mosseri doesn't want to filter out AI content on the platform, he argues that you "shouldn't have it in your feed" if you don't like it.
stories.analysis: 这条新闻属于商业化信号，后续重点是它是否进入高频工作流，并形成稳定付费或留存。

stories.title: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
stories.summary: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.
stories.analysis: 语音模型的体验差距会体现在延迟、自然停顿、噪声环境和多轮上下文保持，而不是单句生成质量。

stories.title: Google will now tell you if an ad was made with AI
stories.summary: You can see if ads on Google Search, Google Discover, and YouTube were made or edited using AI from a new section in Google's "My Ad Center," as reported earlier by TechCrunch.
stories.analysis: 这条新闻属于商业化信号，后续重点是它是否进入高频工作流，并形成稳定付费或留存。

stories.title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
stories.summary: OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.
stories.analysis: 这条新闻更像模型供应链信号：OpenAI 与 Microsoft 的产品绑定会影响企业办公入口、模型议价权和未来替换成本。

stories.title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s no. 2 role
stories.summary: OpenAI's No. 2 executive, Fidji Simo, is stepping down from her full-time role after her medical leave proved longer than expected — a leadership vacuum that comes at a tricky time as the company eyes a possible IPO and races t...
stories.analysis: 高管变动会影响 OpenAI 在 AGI、消费产品和商业化之间的资源分配，短期要看继任安排和关键团队稳定性。

xTrends.signal: 模型能力、价格和开发者可用性是主要讨论点，很多帖子直接拿它和 OpenAI、Anthropic 对比。
讨论集中在新模型分层、企业访问节奏、推理质量和产品体验是否有实质提升。
安全研究者和 CISO 圈层关注 AI Agent 是否会把攻击链自动化到新的速度。
投资者讨论长期数据中心租约、电力容量和 AI 基建股是否进入过热区间。
手机厂商把 AI 拉回端侧入口之争，争议点是功能是否真能改变日常使用。
创作者圈层继续测试视频生成、图像模型和工作流自动化，版权与真实性问题伴随升温。

briefings.title: 从热度看真实优先级
briefings.text: 模型发布仍最容易引爆讨论，但企业最终会按稳定性、成本、权限集成和数据安全来选择供应商。

briefings.title: 安全窗口继续缩短
briefings.text: AI Agent 让攻击链更自动化，防守重点需要前移到身份、权限、工具调用和数据访问异常。

briefings.title: 资本开支影响模型竞争
briefings.text: 算力合同、芯片供应和数据中心成本正在成为 AI 公司竞争力的一部分。

watchlist: OpenAI、Anthropic、Google 是否发布新的 API、价格或企业访问策略
X 高热讨论是否被主流媒体确认，还是停留在圈层争议
AI 数据中心和芯片供应是否出现新的融资、电力或交付约束
监管机构是否把 AI 安全、版权、金融建议或出口限制推进到执法层面
